name: keepa-adapter
description: MCP server for Keepa Amazon product monitoring tools.
long_description: Keepa Adapter exposes Keepa Amazon product monitoring data as MCP tools for product lookup, price history, buy box analysis, variation checks, monitoring snapshots, promotions, sales history, seller stats, and category intelligence.

tools.name: keepa_get_product
tools.description: Fetch current product data for ASINs from Keepa.

tools.name: keepa_get_price_history
tools.description: Get price, rank, rating, and review history for ASINs.

tools.name: keepa_get_buy_box
tools.description: Get buy box ownership and offer information for ASINs.

tools.name: keepa_get_variations
tools.description: Get variation family relationships and attributes for an ASIN.

tools.name: keepa_check_tokens
tools.description: Check remaining Keepa API tokens and refresh rate.

tools.name: keepa_track_asins
tools.description: Add ASINs to the monitoring list.

tools.name: keepa_take_snapshot
tools.description: Fetch and store snapshots for tracked ASINs.

tools.name: keepa_analyze_bsr_trend
tools.description: Analyze BSR trend patterns for ASINs.

tools.name: keepa_check_variations
tools.description: Check variation families for drift and orphaned children.

tools.name: keepa_add_promo
tools.description: Register a promotional event for an ASIN.

tools.name: keepa_analyze_promo_impact
tools.description: Measure promotional lift using rank and price data.

tools.name: keepa_get_sales_history
tools.description: Get monthly sales volume history for ASINs.

tools.name: keepa_get_deals
tools.description: Get coupon history, active promotions, and lightning deal data.

tools.name: keepa_get_seller_stats
tools.description: Get buy box statistics by seller for ASINs.

tools.name: keepa_get_best_sellers
tools.description: Get best seller ASINs for a category.
